testcase.name: getTotalCount_ShouldReturnCorrectCount
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Getting total user count 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: Total users count: 3

testcase.name: getTotalCount_WhenNoUsers_ShouldReturnZero
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Getting total user count 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: Total users count: 0

testcase.name: deleteUser_WhenUserExists_ShouldDeleteUser
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🗑️ Service: Deleting user with ID: 1 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching for user to delete 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📋 Service: Found user to delete - Name: 'John Doe', Email: 'john.doe@example.com' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 💾 Service: Executing delete operation 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: User deleted successfully - ID: 1, Name: 'John Doe', Email: 'john.doe@example.com'

testcase.name: deleteUser_WhenUserNotFound_ShouldThrowException
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🗑️ Service: Deleting user with ID: 999 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching for user to delete 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] ERROR c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ❌ Service: User not found for deletion with ID: 999

testcase.name: updateUser_WhenUserExists_ShouldUpdateUser
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔄 Service: Updating user with ID: 1 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching for user to update 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📋 Service: Current user details - Name: 'John Doe', Email: 'john.doe@example.com', Phone: '123-456-7890' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📝 Service: New user details - Name: 'Updated User', Email: 'updated.user@example.com', Phone: '555-9999' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📧 Service: Email change detected - checking if new email 'updated.user@example.com' exists 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 💾 Service: Saving updated user to database 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: User updated successfully - ID: 1, Name: 'Updated User', Email: 'updated.user@example.com'

testcase.name: updateUser_WhenUserNotFound_ShouldThrowException
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔄 Service: Updating user with ID: 999 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching for user to update 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] ERROR c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ❌ Service: User not found for update with ID: 999

testcase.name: createUser_WithUniqueEmail_ShouldCreateUser
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🆕 Service: Creating new user: New User (new.user@example.com) 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Checking if user with email 'new.user@example.com' already exists 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📝 Service: User details - Name: 'New User', Email: 'new.user@example.com', Phone: '555-0123' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 💾 Service: Saving new user to database 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: User created successfully with ID: 3

testcase.name: searchUsersByPhone_WhenUsersMatch_ShouldReturnMatchingUsers
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching users by phone containing: '123' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Executing phone search query 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: Found 1 users matching phone '123' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 📞 Found user: ID=1, Name='John Doe', Phone='123-456-7890'

testcase.name: existsByEmail_WhenEmailExists_ShouldReturnTrue
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Checking if user exists with email: john.doe@example.com 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: User exists check for 'john.doe@example.com': true

testcase.name: getUserByEmail_WhenUserExists_ShouldReturnUser
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Getting user by email: john.doe@example.com 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: Found user by email: John Doe (ID: 1) 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 👤 User details: ID=1, Name='John Doe', Phone='123-456-7890'

testcase.name: existsByEmail_WhenEmailDoesNotExist_ShouldReturnFalse
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Checking if user exists with email: nonexistent@example.com 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: User exists check for 'nonexistent@example.com': false

testcase.name: searchUsersByName_WhenUsersMatch_ShouldReturnMatchingUsers
testcase.system-out: 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Searching users by name containing: 'John' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 🔍 Service: Executing case-insensitive name search query 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] INFO c.d.springboot.service.UserService - ✅ Service: Found 1 users matching name 'John' 2025-07-26 23:22:02 [main] DEBUG c.d.springboot.service.UserService - 👤 Found user: ID=1, Name='John Doe', Email='john.doe@example.com'

testcase.name: searchUsersByName_WhenNoUsersMatch_ShouldReturnEmptyList
